registration_scope: Local design lock; not externally registered.
purpose: Preserve the three new factorial test suites while development scores are generated and the fit-only candidate screen is executed.

blackjack_v4.construction: Ten deck regimes by four risk profiles; complete Cartesian product with no filtering.

portfolio_v2.construction: Eight return regimes by four risk profiles; complete Cartesian product with no filtering.

inventory_v1.construction: Eight demand regimes by four operating profiles; complete Cartesian product with no filtering.

method_commitments.candidate_screen: Using development tasks only, retain the single candidate with the largest strictly positive mean advantage over the fallback.
method_commitments.proposal: Use five nearest development profiles with exponential temperature 0.75; propose only a positive predicted advantage inside the maximum calibration support radius.
method_commitments.pilot_gate: Evaluate only the proposed candidate and fallback on seven independent common-random-number batches. Promote only if the mean advantage is positive and the exact one-sided sign-test p-value is at most 0.01, with seven nonzero batches.
method_commitments.evaluation: Estimate deployed-router performance on seeds and episodes disjoint from the pilot. Task-level inference averages evaluation seeds before resampling.

allowed_pre_confirmation_work: Generate inventory development and calibration score caches.
Apply the committed fit-only candidate screen.
Finalize execution plumbing and hash-lock it before running any pilot or final outcome on the new confirmation tasks.
prohibited_pre_final_lock_work: Run any policy on a task in the three new confirmation suites.
Change, filter, or reorder confirmation tasks in response to development outcomes.
Change the candidate screen, proposal rule, pilot gate, or primary estimand after observing a new-suite outcome.
smoke_test_disclosure: Before this lock, correctness tests used only synthetic custom tasks and inspected task objects; no policy was simulated on a new confirmation task.
